# ZaZet Solutions — Gal Tidhar

> Zagreb-based software engineer and consultant helping businesses automate processes, build websites, and create custom systems.

## Who I am

Gal Tidhar — Israeli software engineer, resident of Zagreb, Croatia. 10+ years of engineering experience at companies including Shopify, Siemens, and multiple startups. Father of Adam and Ella. "Zagorski Zet" — the foreigner who married into a Zagorje family and never left.

## What I do

- **Business Automation**: Invoices, follow-ups, spreadsheet updates, WhatsApp/email workflows, Make.com, custom scripts
- **Websites**: Clean, fast, mobile-first websites for Croatian small businesses
- **Custom Systems**: Order management, booking flows, client portals
- **Full-Stack Engineering**: TypeScript, Node.js, React, Java — enterprise grade
- **Performance & Cost Optimization**: AWS cost reduction, query tuning, caching strategy (46% infra cost reduction in 6 months)
- **Engineering Leadership**: Interim staff engineer, technical roadmap, team mentorship
- **AI Tools & Vibe Coding**: Base44, Claude Code, AI-assisted development

## Notable results

- Reduced CI build time by 78%, dev overhead by 90% (Sedric)
- Reduced deployment delays by 70% (Shopify/Flexport)
- Reduced infrastructure costs by 46% (Wochit)
- Built a 4-language boat taxi booking system in 4 hours for €50 (Croatian island client)

## Location

Zagreb, Croatia (serving Croatian businesses and international remote clients)

## Contact

- Website: https://zazet-solutions.hr
- Email: gal@zazet-solutions.hr

## Languages

- English (professional)
- Croatian (conversational)
- Hebrew (native)
